sentence: She decided to volunteer at the local animal shelter.
chinese: n. 志愿者； v. 自愿做，无偿提供； adj. 志愿的，自愿参加的

sentence: Every citizen has the right to vote in the election.
chinese: n. 投票，表决；选票；选举权； v. 投票，表决；提议

sentence: His vulgar jokes made everyone uncomfortable.
chinese: adj. 粗俗的，庸俗的；平民的，大众的

sentence: Young children are especially vulnerable to this disease.
chinese: adj. 易受伤害的，脆弱的；易受攻击的

sentence: The author is signing copies of her new book.
chinese: n. 作者，作家；创始人，发起人； v. 写作，创作

sentence: The city council is the local planning authority.
chinese: n. 权力，管辖权；当局，官方；权威，专家

sentence: The hospital uses auxiliary nurses during busy periods.
chinese: adj. 辅助的，备用的； n. 辅助者，辅助设备；助动词

sentence: His efforts to calm her down were of no avail.
chinese: n. 效用，利益； v. 有用于，有益于

sentence: Is this seat available?
chinese: adj. 可获得的，可用的；有空的

sentence: The film critic gave the movie a poor review.
chinese: n. 批评家，评论家；吹毛求疵的人

sentence: Her condition is critical after the accident.
chinese: adj. 关键的，决定性的；批评的，批判性的；危急的

sentence: He accepted the constructive criticism from his teacher.
chinese: n. 批评，指责；评论，评价

sentence: It's easy to criticize others but hard to see our own faults.
chinese: v. 批评，指责；评论，评价

sentence: Some people criticise the government's new policy.
chinese: v. 批评，指责（criticize 的英式拼写）

sentence: Good communication is crucial for a successful team.
chinese: adj. 至关重要的，决定性的

sentence: The year of hard work will culminate in the final exam.
chinese: v. 达到顶点，告终；以...告终

sentence: The police are still searching for the main culprit.
chinese: n. 罪犯，肇事者；问题的起因

sentence: Farmers cultivate the land to grow crops.
chinese: v. 耕作，栽培；培养，陶冶

sentence: Every country has its own unique culture and traditions.
chinese: n. 文化，文明；培养，培育；修养

sentence: The car has dual airbags for safety.
chinese: adj. 双的，双重的； n. 双数

sentence: I am dubious about the truth of his story.
chinese: adj. 怀疑的，不确定的；可疑的，靠不住的

sentence: The rent is due on the first of each month.
chinese: adj. 到期的，应付的；适当的，应有的；预定的； n. 应得物；会费

sentence: This material is very durable and lasts for years.
chinese: adj. 耐用的，持久的； n. [常用复数] 耐用品

sentence: The duration of the movie is two hours.
chinese: n. 持续时间，期间

sentence: It is a citizen's duty to obey the law.
chinese: n. 责任，义务；职责，职务；关税

sentence: She has a dynamic personality that attracts people.
chinese: adj. 动态的，不断变化的；有活力的，精力充沛的； n. 动力，动态

sentence: Dinosaurs have been extinct for millions of years.
chinese: adj. 灭绝的，绝种的；（火山）死的，不再活跃的

sentence: Firefighters worked hard to extinguish the blaze.
chinese: v. 熄灭，扑灭；使消亡，使破灭

sentence: Let me introduce you to my friend.
chinese: v. 介绍，引见；引进，采用；提出（议案等）

sentence: The book has a short introduction at the beginning.
chinese: n. 介绍，引见；引进，传入；引言，序言
